title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (b), GROUP I, PARAGRAPH SEVENTEEN, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, SUBSECTION "f" SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5011 / 52 OG No. 8, 3897 (July 31, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1486, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (b), GROUP I, PARAGRAPH SEVENTEEN, FOR THE PROVINCE OF CEBU, SUBSECTION "f" SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (b), Group I, paragraph seventeen, for the "Province of Cebu, subsection "f" section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended to read as follows:

"(b) Barrio Schools to be designated by the Municipal Mayor, Danao

Construction and/or repairâ¦......................................................P18.000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
